name: Pinar Su ve Icecek Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Pinar Su ve Icecek Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells bottled water, pet bottle, carbonated and noncarbonated beverage, and fruit beverage under the Pinar Yasam Pinarim brand name in Turkey. It also exports its products to United Kingdom, Germany, the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus, Iraq, Kuwait, the United Arab Emirates, Azerbaijan, Bahrain, Romania, Ireland, Libya, Singapore, Malta, Kosovo, Trinidad Tobago, Switzerland, the United States, Ukraine, and Belgium. The company was formerly known as Pinar Su Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Pinar Su ve Icecek Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. in April 2019. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. Pinar Su ve Icecek Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Yasar Holding A.S.
